home.hero_subtitle: We transform political campaign materials into solutions for underprivileged children.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Who we are
mission.p1: Políticamente Correcto is a socio-environmental educational project that transforms leftover election campaign materials into backpacks for children in need. We use banner canvas, a waterproof and resistant material that would otherwise be highly harmful to the environment.
mission.p2: We aim to reduce the environmental impact of political campaigns. Much of this material ends up in rivers or is burned, producing toxins. Where many see waste, we see an opportunity to provide solutions.
mission.p3: We don't just make backpacks; we fill them with school supplies. The material also allows children to decorate them with markers, fostering creativity. Ideologies don't matter here; CHILDREN MATTER.

process.label: The Process
process.title: From political banner to school backpack
process.step4: Delivery with supplies and creative kits.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What people who know us say

t1.quote: Seeing my son receive his new backpack was one of the most beautiful moments. They are doing something that goes far beyond the material.
t1.author: María López

t2.quote: As a volunteer, I understood that real change comes from small collective actions. Políticamente Correcto makes it possible.
t2.author: Andrés Mora

t3.quote: An initiative that proves social responsibility and creativity can turn waste into real opportunities.
t3.author: Catalina Reyes

allies.label: Allies
allies.title: Backed by organizations that believe in change
allies.desc: We work with partners committed to sustainability and education.

cta_band.title: Want to be part of the change?
cta_band.desc: We have room for volunteers, allies, and people who believe there is another way of doing things.

timeline.label: History
timeline.title: Our Evolution
timeline.subtitle: A journey through the impact of Políticamente Correcto over time

events.title: The Beginning
events.description: First banner collection initiative during local elections. The birth of an idea that would change lives.

events.title: Consolidation
events.description: Delivery of the first 500 backpacks to rural communities. The model starts to be tested at scale.

events.title: Strategic Alliances
events.description: Agreements with recycling companies to optimize production. The support network grows.

events.title: National Expansion
events.description: Program launched in 5 major cities. More than 1,500 backpacks delivered.

events.title: Toward the Future
events.description: 100% scalable circular model at a Latin American level. The vision goes global.

volunteer.label: Volunteering
volunteer.title: Be part of the
volunteer.desc: We are looking for creative hands and willing hearts. Whether you are a designer, logistics expert, or simply someone who wants to help, there is a place for you at Políticamente Correcto.

form.title: Send your application
form.subtitle: We will contact you within 48 hours
form.message_label: How do you want to help?
form.message_placeholder: Tell us about yourself and how you'd like to contribute...
form.privacy: Your data is safe. We do not share it with third parties.

success.title: Thank you for joining!
success.desc: We have received your application. We will be in touch soon to transform the world together.

footer.tagline: We transform political campaign waste into backpacks and school supplies for underprivileged children.
